reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요~ 4.2키로 푸들이에요 넉넉하게 라지 했는데 좋아여 캠핑가서 입혔는데 너무 잘어울려요 전 하네스 옷 다 다부분 ssfw에서만 구입해요
reviews.content_en: So cute~ 🐕 My poodle is 4.2kg and I got the large size generously, and it fits great! I wore it to a camping trip and it looked absolutely perfect on her. I buy all my harness clothes from SSFW only.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 엄청 부드럽고 귀여워요! 착용하기에도 편한 디자인이라 겨울에 잘 입힐 수 있을 것 같아요. 모자가 뒤로 고정되도록 디자인된 부분도 세심하게 느껴져요 :)
reviews.content_en: It's super soft and adorable! 😊 The design is also convenient to put on, so I think it'll be great for winter wear. I also appreciate the thoughtful detail of how the hood is designed to stay fixed at the back :)

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 강아지 첫 생일 선물로 사줬어요! 너모 기엽습니다.. ♥
reviews.content_en: Got it as a gift for my pup's first birthday! It's so cute.. ♥

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
에쎕떱 애정하는 강쥐 브랜드인데 이거 보자마자 너무 너무 귀얍고 해서 장바구니에만 담아놓다가 여행계획이 생기면서 따뜻한 꼬까옷 입히고 싶어 하늘색 올인원이랑 같이 구매했는데 너무 잘어울리고 스냅버튼으로 후드 고정할 수 있어서 좋아요
갖고 있는 리드줄 고리 부분쪽이 좀 두꺼워서 이 제품 리드줄 홀에서 꺼내려면 조금 빡빡하긴 한데 잘 입히고 있습니다!
사이즈는 일부러 좀 넉넉하게 했는데 포메 3.1kg에게  아주 낙낙합니다
3.4-6 키로 였을때 목둘레 21-23 가슴둘레 36-38 등길이 28-31 정도 나왔는데 지금 살이 빠져서 더 넉넉하게 느껴지는거 같아요
작은거보다 넉넉한게 나은거 같아요
색감 너무 예쁘고 정말 귀여워요‘
reviews.content_en:
I absolutely love the SSFW brand - my favorite dog brand! 🐶 The moment I saw this, I thought it was so incredibly adorable and kept it in my cart. When I started planning a trip and wanted to get my pup in something warm, I bought it together with the sky blue all-in-one, and it looks amazing! I also love that I can fix the hood with snap buttons.
The leash ring on my current leash is a bit thick, so it's a little snug pulling it out through the leash hole on this product, but it's working fine!
I intentionally got a size up, and on my 3.1kg Pomeranian it's very roomy.
When the size was 3.4-6kg, the neck was about 21-23cm, chest was 36-38cm, and back length was about 28-31cm. Now that my pup lost some weight, it feels even roomier.
Loose fitting seems better than tight!
The color is so pretty and really adorable~

reviews.name: 공****
reviews.content: 세상에 제가 토끼를 키우고 있었나봐요! 🐰🫶🏻 부들부들 폭닥폭닥해요! 추워져서 입혔는데 넘 잘어울리기..🩷 안에 이너 티셔츠 색 바꾸면 느낌 다르게 입히기 좋을 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I must be raising a rabbit! 🐰🫶🏻 It's so fluffy and jiggly! I put it on when it got cold and it looks so good on him..🩷 I think it would be nice to change the color of the inner t-shirt to create different looks!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 테디 시리즈 귀여워요~ 컬러조합 넘 맘에 들어용
reviews.content_en: Love the Teddy series~ The color combination is so perfect 💕

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content_en: The size is roomy and it's so cute!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입히기 편하고 귀여워요 ! 후드에 똑딱이가 있어서 모자 안쓸땐 고정이되어 좋습니당
reviews.content_en: It's easy to put on and adorable! 😊 The hood has snaps so the hat stays in place when not wearing it, which is great!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content_en: It's so cute I gave it as a gift 🎁
